features.name: Pet Canvas Rendering
features.description: Canvas-based pixel-art pet rendering with animation engine, parts system, and particle effects
features.evidence: renderer tests pass, 11 animations registered, animation engine integration test green

features.name: Keyboard Activity Monitoring
features.description: Rust rdev-based global keypress counter, emits Tauri events every 5s with KPM
features.evidence: keyboard.rs unit tests, event emission verified in useKeyboardActivity hook

features.name: LLM Chat Integration
features.description: Multi-provider LLM streaming (DeepSeek, Qwen, Zhipu, Baidu, OpenAI, custom) via SSE
features.evidence: llm.rs provider URL tests, personality prompt tests, skills tests pass

features.name: Settings Persistence
features.description: JSON-based settings store with serde defaults, backward compatibility, camelCase/snake_case normalization
features.evidence: settings.rs tests, get_settings/save_settings IPC commands verified

features.name: Chat Session Management
features.description: LocalStorage-persisted chat sessions with save/load/delete/new, streaming display with blinking cursor

features.name: Pet Customization System
features.description: 6 presets, part/color picker, variant draw functions for body/head/eyes/mouth/tail/accessories
features.evidence: PetCustomizer component, petPresets.ts data, renderer part variants

features.name: Bug Drop Zone
features.description: Drag-and-drop error text analysis via LLM with ASCII fallback
features.evidence: BugDropZone component, crush_bug IPC command tests

features.name: Roast System (吐个槽)
features.description: Context-menu triggered roasts with LLM and hardcoded fallback, 5s speech bubble display
features.evidence: random_roast IPC tests, ContextMenu roasting guard, SpeechBubble timing

features.name: System Tray & Window Management
features.description: Frameless always-on-top window at bottom-right, system tray show/settings/quit, auto-hide on inactivity

features.name: Harness Engineering Integration
features.description: Architecture lint, file protection hooks, AGENTS.md contract, POARC workflow, CI-ready checks
